description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a run_all_tests job that uses the openjdk:11-jdk-slim Docker image, runs chmod +x gradlew then ./gradlew test. In the deploy stage add a deploy_to_development job that runs on the development environment, uses the ruby:2.5 image, installs the dpl gem with gem install dpl and deploys to Heroku via dpl --provider=heroku --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME, and is limited to branch pipelines only.
